Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Target Artifact (Protocols), PowerShell Interpreter, File, Network Traffic
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method, Custom Command and Control Protocol, PowerShell Script, File Modification (Mechanism), Network Traffic Content (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2025-42999 (Suggested): SAP NetWeaver Visual Composer Metadata Uploader contains a deserialization vulnerability that allows a privileged attacker to compromise the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the host system by deserializing untrusted or malicious content.
stage.description: The attacker compromises the victim's device through a drive-by download, exploiting the SAP NetWeaver Visual Composer Metadata Uploader deserialization vulnerability.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2024-9379 (Suggested): Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the admin web console in versions prior to 5.0.2, which can allow a remote attacker authenticated as administrator to run arbitrary SQL statements.
stage.description: The attacker exploits the SQL injection vulnerability in the Ivanti Cloud Services Appliance (CSA) admin web console to gain unauthorized access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.technique_name: T1094: Custom Command and Control Protocol
stage.kev: CVE-2025-1316 (Suggested): Edimax IC-7100 IP camera contains an OS command injection vulnerability due to improper input sanitization that allows an attacker to achieve remote code execution via specially crafted requests.
stage.description: The attacker establishes a custom command and control protocol using the Edimax IC-7100 IP camera's OS command injection vulnerability.

stage.name: Execution
stage.kev: CVE-2020-35730 (Suggested): Roundcube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows an attacker to send a plain text e-mail message with Javascript in a link reference element that is mishandled by linkref_addinindex in rcube_string_replacer.php.
stage.description: The attacker uses PowerShell to execute malicious scripts on the compromised device.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker deletes or corrupts files on the compromised device, causing data destruction.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker disrupts network traffic, causing a denial of service to the transportation system.

Scenario.summary: The SolarWinds Compromise campaign targets transportation systems with basic-level attacks, compromising initial access through drive-by downloads and public-facing application exploitation. The attackers then establish a custom command and control protocol, execute malicious scripts using PowerShell, and cause impact through data destruction and denial of service.
